overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains a highly active and specialized academic presence across LinkedIn, Bluesky, and Mastodon, reaching a combined audience of 3,580 followers. His content centers on computational social science, disinformation research, and academic opportunities. The profile exhibits exceptional audience engagement, particularly on Bluesky and LinkedIn, driven by announcements of research breakthroughs, software updates, and recruitment.

contentThemes.description: Updates on research publications, software tools (CooRnet), and methods for identifying coordinated link-sharing and disinformation campaigns.
Announcements regarding newly awarded research grants and publications in academic journals.
Hiring posts for postdoctoral researchers and PhD opportunities in computational social science.

recommendations: Capitalize on LinkedIn's large follower base by increasing posting frequency, as it yields the highest absolute volume of engagements.
Leverage Bluesky's highly active academic community by hosting interactive Q&A sessions or discussion threads about newly published papers.
Integrate visual aids, such as screenshots of the CooRnet dashboard or data visualizations from papers, to enhance visual engagement across all channels.
Cross-promote content between platforms to funnel followers from the larger LinkedIn network to niche platforms like Mastodon and Bluesky.

platformInsights.bluesky: Bluesky is the most active and responsive channel relative to follower count, achieving an average engagement rate of 6.14%. It shows strong community interest in peer-reviewed papers and academic career paths.
platformInsights.mastodon: Mastodon provides steady engagement (average 4.55% rate) from a highly technical audience. Tool releases like CooRnet v2.0 perform particularly well here, suggesting an audience that values open-source academic tools.
platformInsights.linkedin: LinkedIn has the largest audience (1,850 followers) and drives the highest absolute interaction volume, averaging 90 engagements per post. It is the premier platform for professional milestones like grant announcements and job recruitment.

topPerformingContent.content: Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
New research opportunity for PhD students interested in computational social science. Reply for details!
Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.
